use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: feed parallel stage directly from producer
fn process_entries(dir: &Path) -> Vec<Output> {
    std::fs::read_dir(dir)
        .unwrap()
        .filter_map(|e| e.ok())
        .par_bridge()
        .map(|entry| process_entry(&entry))
        .collect()
}

// GOOD: filter in parallel stage
fn transform_data(records: &[Record]) -> Vec<Output> {
    records.par_iter()
        .filter(|r| r.is_valid())
        .map(|r| transform(r))
        .collect()
}
